text: Every weekday, I start my morning at 6:30 AM with a glass of water and a short meditation session. After a quick breakfast, I review my to-do list for the day. My work begins at 8:30 AM and continues until 5 PM, with a lunch break at noon. To stay healthy, I go for a thirty-minute jog right after work. In the evening, I prepare dinner, read for about an hour, and unwind by watching a show. I am always in bed by 10:30 PM. This routine keeps me productive and balanced, and I stick to it every day.
